parameters.query:
INSERT INTO pm_bot_errors (workflow_name,node_name,error_message,execution_id,payload)
VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5::jsonb) RETURNING id;

INSERT INTO events_outbox (event_id, target, action, idempotency_key, payload)
VALUES ($1, 'discord', 'pm_report', $2, $3::jsonb)
ON CONFLICT (idempotency_key) DO NOTHING
RETURNING outbox_id;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [ "pm-error-" + Date.now(), "pm-error-" + Date.now(), JSON.stringify({ content: $("Format Error").item.json.content, channel_id: $("Format Error").item.json.channel_id }) ] }}
